ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event (e.g., IN0978216) */,
  "event_desc" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* The location where the event takes place */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* The status of the event (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "event_priority" INTEGER /* The priority level of the event (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium, 3 for low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" REAL /* Unique identifier for each entity (e.g., 0.53) */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* The type of entity (e.g., organization, individual, system) */,
  "entity_address" TEXT /* The address or contact information of the entity */,
  "entity_contact" TEXT /* The contact person or email for the entity */,
  "entity_status" TEXT /* The status of the entity (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_templates" (
  "template_id" REAL /* Unique identifier for each log template (e.g., 0.74) */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the log template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the log template */,
  "template_version" TEXT /* The version of the log template */,
  "template_status" TEXT /* The status of the log template (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event relationship */,
  "event_a_id" TEXT /* ID of the first event in the relationship */,
  "event_b_id" TEXT /* ID of the second event in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., causal, correlated) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* A numerical value indicating the strength of the relationship (e.g., 0.8 for strong, 0.3 for weak) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* A description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* The status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_relationships_event_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_a_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_relationships_event_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_b_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_entities" (
  "event_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-entity association */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "entity_id" REAL /* ID of the entity involved in the event */,
  "entity_role" TEXT /* The role of the entity in the event (e.g., organizer, participant, observer) */,
  "entity_status" TEXT /* The status of the entity's involvement (e.g., confirmed, pending, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entities_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event the log belongs to */,
  "template_id" REAL /* ID of the log template used to generate the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* The source of the log (e.g., system, user, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES log_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_log_details" (
  "log_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log detail */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log the detail belongs to */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Actual log data */,
  "log_source_id" TEXT /* The unique identifier of the log source */,
  "log_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_log_details_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES event_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* The position or role of the user within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event data */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the event data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* The status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* The visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* A description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* The type of the tag (e.g., category, label) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
